description:
Base / Home Port: Nassau / BVI / USVI
Operating Area: Bahamas

Welcome to our luxurious 4 cabin, 4-bathroom catamaran 'MC Pandora', available for rent in the beautiful Bahamas (from 31 December 2023 until the end of February 2024). 
Our one-of-a-kind luxury catamaran and exceptionally skilled Captain, offers guests the unique opportunity to experience Bahamas island life on the water. 
Pandora features spacious and stylish living areas, including a large lounge and dining area, a fully-equipped kitchen, and three outdoor decks, perfect for lounging and taking in the stunning views. 
The cherry wood finishes, holly and teak floors bring a touch of elegance and coziness to the space - a beautiful and charming environment to explore paradise. 
Each of the cabins is designed with comfort in mind, offering plush bedding and private bathrooms. Wake up to the sound of the ocean and watch the sun rise over the horizon from the comfort of your bed. All bedrooms have air conditioner and ventilation system to keep our guests comfortable during their stay. 
Our catamaran is fully equipped with all the necessary amenities to ensure a comfortable and enjoyable stay. 
Guests will have access to a range of water sport equipment, including kayaks and paddleboards, as well as snorkeling gear to explore the vibrant coral reefs surrounding the boat. 
We specialize in hosting families with kids, so we're equipped for fishing, treasure hunting (metal detectors) and snorkelling. We know great spots to find Sand Dollars and make the best smoothies you've ever tasted. 
Our catamaran can also be chartered for an adventure around the islands or located in an anchorage. Guests are also welcome to take advantage of the on-board meals prepared by Captain/Chef Sean or dine in style on the land. 
Whether you're looking for a romantic getaway, a family vacation, or an adventure with friends, our luxury catamaran offers the perfect blend of relaxation and adventure. 
Safety is our utmost priority. Pandora is equipped with state-of-the-art safety features, including an enclosed cockpit area, providing a secure environment for all guests.

crew.name: Sean Wisedale
crew.bio:
Captain Sean, an experienced and adventurous sailor, possesses a deep understanding of luxury and style, amidst untamed environments.  
With a remarkable twenty-year tenure as the head of a high-altitude guiding company, Sean successfully led expeditions to Mt. Everest and embarked on two ski expeditions to the South Pole.  
His sailing journey began long before that tale - most recently he sailed his young family from South Africa, across the Atlantic, on their sailing catamaran African Dream. 
As your captain, his foremost concern is your safety and well-being.  
With Captain Sean at the helm, you can relax and enjoy your voyage, knowing that you are under the guidance of a seasoned professional who understands the importance of both safety and delivering a truly exceptional sailing experience. 
Embark on a remarkable journey with Captain Sean, where luxury and style harmoniously blend with the untamed beauty of the ocean.
